description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, the top one featuring a vibrant purple cover with a slightly worn, matte texture. Both books are bound together by a wide, textured black strap that wraps vertically around their centers, giving a sense of secure bundling. The lower book has a brown cover with visible wear on the corners and edges, and faint embossed text along its spine. The pages of both books are white and tightly bound, with the top book's edges showing a subtle red accent. The strap appears to be made of a faux reptile or hammered leather material, adding a tactile contrast to the smooth book covers. No visible illustrations or artwork are present on the covers, and the overall appearance suggests these are well-used, possibly magical or reference books.
description: Two stacked hardcover books, the top one purple and the bottom brown, bound together by a wide, textured black strap. The books show signs of wear and have plain covers with no visible illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white page edges of both books, the purple cover on top, and the black strap running vertically.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the brown lower book's spine with faint embossed text, the purple top cover, and the black strap bisecting both books.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible page edges and the black strap, but the red accent on the top book's edge is more noticeable.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full width of the black strap and the clean, unembellished spines of both books.
attribute_spine_design: The lower book's spine is brown with faint, embossed text and some visible wear at the edges. The top book's spine is purple with no visible text or decoration.
